title: chaetoseris teniana
intro: Chaetoseris teniana, also known as Chinese dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Chaetoseris teniana are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
